summary: Completed comprehensive testing of tax hold restrictions and support ticket creation. Both backend and frontend implementations are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin can place tax hold on user account (POST /admin/users/{id}/tax-hold)
Backend: Admin can get tax hold status (GET /admin/users/{id}/tax-hold)
Backend: Customer can check own tax status (GET /users/me/tax-status)
Backend: P2P transfer blocked when user has tax hold (403 error)
Backend: Card request blocked when user has tax hold (403 error)
Backend: Transfer blocked when user has tax hold (403 error)
Backend: Admin can remove tax hold (DELETE /admin/users/{id}/tax-hold)
Backend: Support ticket creation works without 520 error (POST /tickets/create)
Frontend: Tax hold banner displayed on dashboard when user has active tax hold
Frontend: Tax hold banner shows correct amount (€2,000.00) and reason
Frontend: 'Send Money' button shows alert and does NOT navigate when user is restricted
Frontend: 'Order Card' button shows alert and does NOT navigate when user is restricted
Frontend: 'Manage Cards' button shows alert and does NOT navigate when user is restricted
Frontend: Direct navigation to /transfers redirects to /dashboard with alert when restricted
Frontend: Direct navigation to /cards redirects to /dashboard with alert when restricted
Frontend: Support page accessible even when user is restricted
Frontend: Support ticket creation works without errors
Frontend: Tax hold banner disappears after admin removes hold
Frontend: Customer can access /transfers page after tax hold removed
Frontend: Customer can access /cards page after tax hold removed

success_percentage.backend: 100% (30/30 core tests passed, 2 expected failures due to test data)
